name: Embassy Bombing
description: A massive detonation has levelled an embassy in the capital sector. Intelligence strongly points towards rival state sponsorship.

name: Border Fleet Standoff
description: Naval exercise fleets have dangerously intermingled near a disputed, mineral-rich asteroid belt. Weapons are hot.

name: Covert Supply Leak Exposed
description: A dark freighter carrying military-grade weaponry to local dissidents was intercepted. The cargo manifests trace directly back to a rival power.

name: High-Profile Defection
description: A decorated Admiral from the rival fleet has arrived claiming asylum, bringing critical shield frequency codes.
